name: Spotlight Cursor Reveal — Click-to-Illuminate
description: A cursor moves smoothly along a waypoint path to a UI element, performs a click animation with scale pulse and ripple ring, then a radial spotlight expands from the click point to reveal content beneath.

cursorPath.description: Array of {x, y, t} waypoints where t is normalized 0-1 within the cursor phase

spotlightRadius.description: Final radius of the spotlight reveal in pixels

revealDelay.description: Delay in ms after click before spotlight starts expanding

glowColor.description: Color of the spotlight glow effect

cursorSize.description: Size of the cursor icon in pixels

clickScale.description: Scale of cursor at click impact

rippleMaxRadius.description: Maximum radius of the click ripple ring

rippleDuration.description: Duration of the ripple ring animation in ms

content_schema.spotlightTarget: string (optional, label for the target element)
content_schema.revealContent: string (optional, text content revealed by spotlight)

sub_primitives.name: Cursor Move
sub_primitives.description: Smooth cursor path interpolation along waypoints with eased timing between stops. Requires JS for multi-point path interpolation.

sub_primitives.name: Spotlight Glow
sub_primitives.description: Radial gradient reveal expanding from a point, creating a spotlight/illumination effect.
sub_primitives.css: @keyframes spotlight-glow { 0%{clip-path:circle(0% at var(--cx) var(--cy))} 100%{clip-path:circle(50% at var(--cx) var(--cy))} }

sub_primitives.name: Click Ripple
sub_primitives.description: Click feedback ring that expands outward from the click point with opacity fade.

when_to_use: Feature tutorials — showing where to click and what happens
Product walkthroughs — guiding attention through a UI flow
Onboarding demos — revealing features with interactive feel
Interaction demos — simulating user actions for stakeholder review
when_to_avoid: Cinematic-dark personality — cursor interactions feel too literal
Montage personality — hard cuts conflict with gradual reveal
Scenes under 2.5 seconds — cursor travel + click + reveal needs time
ai_guidance: Use layer type 'spotlight_cursor_reveal' with content { cursorStyle, spotlightTarget, revealContent } and cursor_config overrides including a cursorPath array. Phase 1 (0-40%) moves cursor along waypoints, Phase 2 (40-55%) click animation, Phase 3 (55-100%) radial spotlight reveal. Duration ~3s.
